source_pr.title: executor: makes dirty table supports XAPI.
source_pr.body: Currently, if a transaction has written some data, XAPI can not be used, this PR fixes this issue.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("7 6", "6 8", "4 8", "3 4", "2 3", "1 5")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("7 6", "6 8", "4 8", "3 4", "2 3", "1 5")) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("7 6", "6 8", "4 8", "3 4", "2 3", "1 5")) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_ddl.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/executor_write.go, executor/union_scan.go, mysql/set.go, session.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/cop_handler.go
